content: your current team is fine, i think the most crucial and obvious thing is that you lack soulforge levels
a massive amount of vortice damage comes from her soulforge
you are also significantly underleveled for arc 2, you are not even level 60 lol
so i think this is pretty straightforward, just level your characters up, you will see your max hp go up and you will have no problems
surviving endgame with vortice is about managing defensive cooldowns, just time your white stance -> murphy exalt -> celeste exalt and it should be fine for arc 2 story mode

> 1

no, so now you see how important it is to level those

> 2

you can farm xp potions if you need them badly. you should be buying xp every day from the shop, do that if you aren't already

> 3

celeste helps with surviving which you mentioned was a problem. she is a godsend for low hp gaming. horla is not a bad idea, but you will have a significantly smaller white stance shield

> 4

kath will be stronger but you need e3 or bust

> 5

I think you should pull both before you pull kath

Thanks for the advice! 

It seems like I will be farming for some Exp Pots then. I have been buying them daily since the Rose Script shop unlocked, but due to needing to needing D-Tide teams, I ran out <:cry2:1356068126894194758> 

As for the pulls, I think I will try to aim for a single copy of each for now and then see how many remaining pulls I have left. If I do have a good amount of pulls left, do you think GDoll (E1 at least) or Kath (E3) be worth getting based on what units I have?
